items.title: Ask HN: How are you handling QA being bottlenecked with more AI-generated PRs?
items.summary: At my company engineers are producing a high quantity of PRs with the help of AI agents. QA was already the bottleneck since the software involves camera flows across multiple devices, now this is more so the case. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48059756 Points: 3 # Comments: 1
